programmes.show_description: Tá Manue faoi bhrú mar gheall ar an bhfiosrúchán, táthar ag díriú ar a nia anois. (The inquiry puts Manue to the test. This time, the investigation focuses on her nephew.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Tugann an fidléir Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Thír Eoghain chun blaiseadh de cheol na háite a fháil.(Doireann Ní Ghlacáin visits Tyrone, discovering its rich musical heritage.)
Glacfaidh an dá fhoireann ar bharr chlár na bpointí páirt i mbabhta ceannais Go Gasta. (The two teams at the top of the leader board reach the Go Gasta Finale.)
Rachaidh Conall chun cónaithe le pobal Hare Krishna sa Bheilg. (Conall is WWOOFing solo this week and visits a Hare Krishna community in Belgium.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Lá na nAmadán atá ann agus tá Ribín ag iarraidh cleas a imirt ar a cuid cairde. (It's April Fool's Day and Ribín and Glibín want to play a trick on her friends.)
Tá fiacail scaoilte ag Babaí Trucail agus cuirtear an gas mícheart i mboinn Max. (Baby has a wobbly tooth, and Max's tyres are filled with the wrong gas.)
Tá Cory agus Chrissy sa tóir ar thaisce Dhaideo, ní mór dóibh na leideanna a d'fhág sé ina dhiaidh a lorg. (Cory and Chrissy search for Grandpa's treasure.)
Tá torann éigin ag coinneáil gach duine ina ndúiseacht. Meas tú cá as a bhfuil an torann ag teacht? (Something is keeping everyone awake. Where could the noise be coming from?)
Tá Nat amú sa choill agus tá sé ag éirí dorcha! (Nat finds himself lost in the woods as it gets darker.)
Tá comórtas cróice ar fheirm DeBrún. Tá maisiúcháin déanta ag Zee ach tá trioblóid leo. (It's MacBarm's croquet tournament &  Zee made giant decorations but they're too big.)
Tá an Ninja Oíche sa tóir ar fháinne ach meas tú an aimseoidh na mascanna ar dtús é? (Night Ninja and the ninjalinos stole the scroll and go to Mystery Mountain to get the ring.)
Tá Finny agus a cuid cairde ag iarraidh dráma a chur ar siúl faoin múinteoir. (Finny's class is making a play about their teacher, Mr. Magellan.)
Níl Igam Ogam in ann codladh. (Igam Ogam is having trouble sleeping.)
Tagann fear mistéireach go dtí an Baile Draíochta ar Lá Collodi ag tarraingt trioblóide. (A mysterious man arrives in the village on Collodi's Day, stirring up trouble.)
Féachann fear feasa leis an dallamullóg a chur ar mhuintir an Bhaile Draíochta. (A fortune teller attempts to fool the people of An Baile Draíochta.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tagann Lola ar bhréagán ar scoil agus níl a fhios aici ar cheart di é a choinneáil. (Lola finds someone else's toy at school and isn't sure if she should keep it or not.)
Níl tada le déanamh ag Charlie agus Lola ó tharla go bhfuil sé ag cur báistí. (It's raining outside, and Charlie and Lola have nothing to do.)
Bíonn Lola i gcónaí ag iarraidh a bheith cabhrach ach milleann sí obair scoile Charlie. (Lola tries to be helpful all the time, but she ends up ruining Charlie's schoolwork.)
Faigheann Lola agus a cara Lotta amach faoi iontaisí. (Lola and her best friend Lotta find out about fossils.)
Tá Lola ag ceapadh nach bhfuil Charlie agus Marv mór le chéile níos mó. (Lola is convinced that Charlie and Marv are not friends anymore.)
Níl muintir Zak sásta leis na marcanna a fuair sé sa scrúdú mata. Fostaíonn siad teagascóir chun cúnamh a thabhairt dó. (Zak's parents aren't pleased with his maths exam results.)
Déanfaidh Zak agus a chairde gach is féidir chun an fhoireann sacair bhuí a bhualadh. (Zak and his friends do everything in their power to beat the rival soccer team.)
Tá Joey ag iarraidh a fháil amach cé a thug cuireadh do Nóirín chuig an bpáirc spraoi nua. (Joey plays detective as he tries to find out who sent a classmate an invitation.)
Féachann Joey a chur ina luí ar chuairteoir go bhfuil an scoil thar barr ar fad. (Joey sets out to show how great the school is.)
Níl Olive ná Yassine mór lena chéile agus tá Joey ag iarraidh réiteach a dhéanamh. (When Olive and Yassine have a fight, Joey tries to bring them back together.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Cuirtear oícheanta craiceáilte eile i gcuimhne do Rose, Blanche agus Sophia. (Rose, Blanche and Sophia recall scandalous evenings from the past.)
Glacann Blanche agus Rose páirt i teileatón agus téann Dorothy chuig teiripe in éineacht le Stan. (Blanche and Rose participate in a telethon, and Dorothy joins Stan in therapy.)
Is ag Seó Chaisleán Uidhilín i gContae an Dúin a bheifear sa gclár seo. (This week we're at the Castlewellan Show in County Down.)
Tá an sadhlas réitithe le gearradh den dara huair agus tá na conraitheoirí réitithe le dul ag burláil. (The second cuts of silage are ready and our contractors are ready to cut and bale.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Ros Comáin agus Dún na nGall i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Peile Allianz. (Live coverage of Roscommon v Donegal in the Allianz Football League.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Muineachán agus Gaillimh i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Peile Allianz. (Live coverage of Monaghan v Galway in round 6 of the Allianz Football League.)

Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Larabel agus UshMush a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Larabel and UshMush swap songs for a musical challenge.)
Iarrann Réailtín ar Vera cúnamh a thabhairt di Micheál a iompú in aghaidh Laoise. (Réailtín goes to Vera for help, doing everything she can to turn Micheál against Laoise.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar an Oirthear na Gaillimhe ag bualadh le ceoltóirí na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels around East Galway, meeting local musicians.)

programmes.show_name: The Chieftains Water from the Well
programmes.show_description: Aistear ceoil in éineacht leis an mbanna ceoil The Chieftains. (Journey with the Chieftains to the special places and people of the home counties that form the band's musical soul.)

Socraíonn Bréidín a chuid ribíní a choinneáil i mbosca ach ní fada go ndéanann Clúmh ball séire de. (Tweedy decides that his ribbon collection would be best kept in a box.)
Is lá speisialta atá ann do Cody inniu! (It's Cody's special day at school!)
Tá cara le JJ, Emmy an Eilifint tinn! (JJ's friend Emmy the Elephant isn't feeling so well.)
Tá na Dathanna ar fad tagtha le chéile inniu  le dul ag spraoi. (Today, all the Colours come together to play.)
Téann Cory agus muintir an bhaile sa tóir ar an bhfear uachtar reoite. (Cory and the residents of Bumperton go in search of the ice cream truck.)
Déanann damhsa an lae inniu sárimreoirí cispheile de Chaitríona agus Roy. (Caitríona and Roy are brilliant basketball players after learning today's dance.)
Ag foghlaim faoi cheardaíocht a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about crafts today.)
Ag foghlaim faoi dhaoine a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about people today.)
Níl Pip in ann díriú ar an tóraíocht taisce atá déanta ag Posy dó. (Pip can't concentrate on the Toy Quest treasure hunt that Posy has made for him.)
Aimsíonn Tríona Trilse seomra nua sa chrann le linn di a bheith ag tóraíocht balúin a chuaigh ar strae. (Locks-a-Lottie finds a new room in the tree.)
Téann na PJ Masks i ndiaidh an Ninja Oíche agus na Ninjalino ar Chnoc Mistéire. (Night Ninja and the ninjalinos read the books they stole and the PJ Masks go after them.)
Maisíonn Wussywat crann Nín le sreang snasta. (Wussywat decorates Ird's tree with some glossy string.)
Socraíonn Emily Eilís agus a cairde a ndeireadh féin a chur leis an scéal. (Emily Elizabeth and her friends create a perfect ending to a book for story time.)
Caithfidh na cairde a gcuid samhlaíochta a úsáid chun scéal a chríochnú. (The pups have to use imagination to finish a story.)
Tá Ginger ag imirt cluiche folach bíog leis na Piseanna-Rex. (Ginger teaches the baby Pea-Rexes a new survival skill through a game of hide-and-seek.)
Tá Dot ag iarraidh bréagán nua. (Dot wants a new toy.)
Bíonn Ella ar mhuin na muice nuair a thagann sí ar sheanphianó i nGairdín na Gréine. (Ella is delighted to find an old piano in Sunshine Gardens.)

Tá an scoil ar fad ag spraoi le húlahúpanna ach tá Lola tinn de. (The whole school is hula hooping, and Lola has had enough.)
Tá coinín fiáin goidte ag an Máistreás Sorcais. (When a wild rabbit goes missing, the gang must get it back from the thieving Ringmaster.)
Caithfidh Pat an cianrialtán teilifíse a fháil ar ais ó na Guanos agus Caipín a shábháil. (Pat must get back the stolen TV remote control and save Caipín from the Guanos.)
Tá Tracy fostaithe ag máthair Pheadair le haire a thabhairt dó. (Mom hires Tracy to babysit Peter.)
Ní thaitníonn sé le Daid go bhfuil Learaí ag breathnú ar fhíseán nach bhfuil feiliúnach dó. (Dad is very unimpressed when Peter watches a DVD that isn't suitable for him.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi shiorcín óg a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about a Baby Shark.)
An bhfuil gadaí i measc na mBlocuimhreacha? (PI One was wondering where her next case would come from when a square silhouette appeared at the door.)
Tagann an dath Oráiste ar cuairt inniu. (Today, the colour Orange pays a visit.)
Cén chaoi a phiocann tú úlla atá thuas ard ar chrann? Le gas pónaire mór millteach ar ndóigh! (How do you pick apples high up in the tree? With a giant beanstalk!)
Tá Pompon, Rita & Gabi ag ligean orthu féin gur foghlaithe mara. (Pompon, Rita & Gabi pretend to be pirates until Pompon is asked to do a little job.)
Is í Síle Ní Chonghaile a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Síle Ní Chonghaile.)
Téann Pip agus Posy ag campáil sa ghairdín chun breathnú ar réaltaí reatha ach níl Posy in ann fanacht socair. (Pip and Posy camp in the garden to watch falling stars.)
Tá Helen ag iarraidh ar an rang scéalta sí a chumadh inniu. (Helen asks the class to invent and perform a fairy tale together.)
Níl Muiris ná Nóinín ábalta Zaboosh a thuiscint i gceart. (Zaboosh has difficulty being understood by Nóinín and Muiris.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Tá fadhb ollmhór i gCathair an Bhogha Ceatha mar go bhfuil na Cúntóirí Beaga ag dul thar fóir. (Rainbow city has a huge problem when all the little helpers try helping.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina shurfálaí nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a surfer when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Téann Zou agus a chairde chuig an bpáirc le haghaidh picnice. (Zou and his friends go to the park for a picnic today but Zou's lunch goes missing on the way there.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh capall ag spraoi agus mór-rón spraíúil ag glacadh páirt i seó. (On today's programme we have a horse having a ball and a sea lion puts on a show.)
